harness: tools live AT-SPI driver (pyatspi) against the running release binary on Hyprland 0.55.4

coverage.note: Per-category live proof plus a whole-suite backend partition guarantee. Every one of the 117 save-only rows is admitted by is_save_only_editable and routes through the identical attach_inline_save_only_control -> stage_save_only_change -> ledger path, guarded by tests/save_only_pending.rs::every_non_gated_non_live_row_with_a_control_is_editable (117, no gaps). The live harness drove at least one representative row from each newly-unlocked category end to end.
coverage.notFullPerRowLiveDrive: driving all 341 rows individually through flaky live AT-SPI in one session was not done; the backend guard proves classification+control+ledger for all, and the live harness proves the shared code path per category

chip + Devices badge + bottom bar (staged, not saved to disk)
